title: [Apache Flink 1.12.2 Released](</2021/03/03/apache-flink-1.12.2-released/>)
summary:
#  Apache Flink 1.12.2 Released
March 3, 2021 - Yuan Mei Roman Khachatryan
The Apache Flink community released the next bugfix version of the Apache Flink 1.12 series.
This release includes 83 fixes and minor improvements for Flink 1.12.1.…
